structured_payload_candidate.title: Dual-Duct VAV Temperature Control - Cooling Mode
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Dual-duct VAV terminal unit with discharge airflow sensor
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When the Zone State is cooling, the cooling-loop output resets the active cold duct airflow setpoint from minimum endpoint to cooling maximum endpoint. The cold duct damper is modulated by a control loop to maintain measured cold duct airflow at the active setpoint. If cold duct supply air temperature is greater than room temperature, the active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Cooling-loop output resets active cold duct airflow setpoint from minimum endpoint to cooling maximum endpoint. Cold duct damper modulated to maintain measured cold duct airflow at active setpoint. If cold duct supply air temperature > room temperature, active cold duct airflow setpoint ≤ minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When the Zone State is cooling, the cooling-loop output shall reset the active cold duct airflow setpoint from minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. The cold duct damper shall be modulated by a control loop to maintain the measured cold duct airflow at the active cold duct airflow setpoint. If cold duct supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active cold duct airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Dual-Duct VAV Temperature Control - Heating Mode
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Dual-duct VAV terminal unit with discharge airflow sensor
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When the Zone State is heating, the Heating Loop output is mapped to the hot duct damper position. The cold duct damper is modulated to maintain measured discharge airflow at the minimum endpoint. If hot duct supply air temperature is less than room temperature, the hot duct damper shall be closed. Maximum hot duct airflow is limited by a reverse-acting P-only loop with setpoint equal to the heating maximum endpoint and output ranging 0% to 100%.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Heating Loop output mapped to hot duct damper position. Cold duct damper modulated to maintain measured discharge airflow at minimum endpoint. If hot duct supply air temperature < room temperature, hot duct damper closed. Maximum hot duct airflow limited by reverse-acting P-only loop with setpoint = heating maximum endpoint, output 0% to 100%.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When the Zone State is heating, the Heating Loop output shall be mapped to the hot duct damper position. The cold duct damper is modulated to maintain measured discharge airflow at the minimum endpoint. If hot duct supply air temperature from the air handler is less than room temperature, the hot duct damper shall be closed. Maximum hot duct airflow shall be limited by a reverse-acting P-only loop whose setpoint is the heating maximum endpoint and whose output is the maximum hot duct damper position ranging from 0% to 100%.
